rules.rule_text:
rule password_list
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit and @Plazmaz"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$data_format = /\b[\w-]+(\.[\w-]+)*@[\w-]+(\.[\w-]+)*\.[a-zA-Z-]+[\w-]["|']?(:|\|)[^\b\s]+\b/

	condition:
		#data_format> 10
}
